summary: Verified NEW features only (AI insights, Profile, Budgets, Recurring tx, enhanced Landing). 17/17 new pytest cases pass (incl. real Claude Sonnet 4.5 call). Frontend Playwright covered: landing hero+stats(4.230/128.000+/98%/25+)+pricing R$0 render; sidebar has nav-budgets & nav-profile; /app/budgets shows 3 seeded cards with correct color bands (Alimentação 93% amber, Lazer 27% green, Transporte 50% green), new-budget modal creates 4th card; /app/profile renders all 6 data-testids with current name 'Usuário Demo'; Dashboard ai-insights-btn triggers POST /api/insights/ai and renders ai-insights-panel with 6 color-coded insight cards (success/warning/info); Transactions modal exposes tx-recurring checkbox that reveals tx-recurring-frequency select; recurring tx list row shows purple 'monthly' chip with icon.

issues: Missing data-testid on feature cards, testimonials, preview showcase and top progress bar — visual rendering is correct, but reduces automation testability (feature-card-*, testimonial-*, preview-*, top-progress not found).
React Router v6 future flag warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) — cosmetic (carried over from iter 1)

action_items: (Optional / low priority) Add data-testid attributes to Landing sub-sections (feature-card-*, testimonial-*, preview-*, top-progress) to match spec for downstream regression coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') — migrate to lifespan context manager.
/api/insights/ai catches all exceptions and returns 503 with generic message — consider logging traceback with logger.exception and distinguishing quota/rate-limit vs parse errors.
Budget category is a fixed <select> on the frontend — user cannot define custom categories; if that's product intent it's fine, otherwise consider a combobox.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True still present (starlette warning); tighten for production.
test_credentials: admin@finix.com/Admin@123 (ADMIN); demo@finix.com/Demo@123 (USER). Demo name now 'Usuário Demo' (accented).
seed_data_creation: Used seeded demo user. Created a handful of TEST_* budgets & transactions via fresh registered users scoped to each test; nothing polluting demo data except 1 UI-created 'Moradia' budget for demo (can be deleted by main agent if desired).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py -v`. AI endpoint takes 3-15s so use timeout>=60s. Dashboard btn: ai-insights-btn → ai-insights-panel. Budgets page testids: budgets-page, new-budget-btn, budget-modal, budget-category (SELECT not input — use select_option), budget-limit, budget-save, budget-card-{id}. Profile: profile-page, profile-name, save-name, current-password, new-password, change-password. Transactions modal opens via new-transaction-btn; tx-recurring checkbox reveals tx-recurring-frequency. Iteration 1 file /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is still valid regression suite.
